$schema_note: Conforms to ADR-025 + ADR-026 + M5.5 AC #6. 4th canonical D14 cycle JSON. Reference-class 2nd instance in M5.5; uses §6 cross-section preservation when textually referenced from sister doc.

content_class_declaration.ceiling_band_rationale: migration_guide.md is the canonical reference doc for the 'adding aDNA to existing project' path. Reference class 25-35% ceiling per M5.4 D12 lightweight AAR Finding. M5.5 mission spec §S2 cycle 124 sets target ~350-400 from 541 (~25-30%). Preserve §6 Starter Templates section — agent_first_guide.md cycle 123 retained textual '§ 6' reference.
content_class_declaration.ceiling_compliance_note: 30.9% sits squarely in 25-35% reference-class band. PASS without disambiguation. Cross-section preservation honored: §6 Starter Templates retained (trimmed but present) since agent_first_guide.md § cross-doc reference relies on §6 anchor target.

step_1_capture_state.method: Read full file + h2/h3 outline + bloat-hotspot identification + cross-doc reference grep

h2_sections: 2. Which Form Is Right for You?

bloat_hotspots_identified.rationale: 40% of file. Procedural scaffolding around code blocks (Step 1 ASCII directory tree; Step 2/3 verbose customize prose; Step 4 three separate AGENTS.md code blocks)
Three near-identical templates differing only in directory name + topic — collapse to 1 template + 3-row substitution table
Inline templates with YAML padding + prose between blocks; MANIFEST + STATE can merge to 1 dual-purpose block (annotated)
Each pitfall has 2-3 sentence narrative; compress to 1-2 each
Each stage has multi-sentence paragraph; compress to single sentence each

pre_change_inventory.cross_doc_reference_constraint: agent_first_guide.md (cycle 123 just edited) retains textual reference 'Use starter templates in the [Migration Guide](migration_guide.md) § 6' — §6 Starter Templates section MUST persist (trimmed OK; dropped NOT OK without coordinated cross-file change)

step_1_capture_state.scope_decision: Full-file Write replacement. Cuts: (1) §4 Step 1 drop ASCII directory tree; (2) §4 Steps 2-6 tighten surrounding prose, preserve templates; (3) §4 Step 4 collapse 3 AGENTS.md → 1 template + 3-row substitution table; (4) §6 Starter Templates preserved as section but tightened — MANIFEST + STATE merged to single annotated block; CLAUDE.md + AGENTS.md trimmed YAML/whitespace; (5) §7 Common Pitfalls 6 entries → 1-2 sentences each; (6) §8 What to Do Next 5 stages → 1 sentence each; (7) §3 Essential files + triad directories merged to single intro + concise tables. Renumber preserved (1-9). Target: 541 → ~350-400 lines.

step_2_persona_qa.method: agent-simulated 5-question Q&A — IA + OSS Maintainer + UX Writer + Newcomer (long-form reference doc with cross-doc dependencies; OSS Maintainer eligibility from multi-vault adoption angle)
step_2_persona_qa.qa_protocol_focus: Q1 Style + Q2 Clarity + Q3 Conciseness + Q4 Bloat + Q5 Comprehension

persona_consensus.information_architect: §4 vs §6 has structural duplication of CLAUDE.md/MANIFEST/STATE/AGENTS.md templates. §4 inline templates serve procedural; §6 standalone serves reference lookup. Both valid roles but prose around each is verbose. Tighten both rather than drop §6 (agent_first_guide.md cross-reference). Step 4's 3 AGENTS.md code blocks are needless triplication — collapse. Score 3.0/5.0 pre-cycle for conciseness.
persona_consensus.oss_maintainer: 5-10 min read currently. Multi-vault adopter reading this for the first time wants tight procedural + fast template lookup. The 218-line §4 dominates; tighten prose without losing templates. §7 Pitfalls + §8 Next are useful but verbose. Score 3.0/5.0 pre-cycle.
persona_consensus.ux_writer: Prose around procedural blocks (`Customize: Replace the bracketed sections...`, `Spend a minute here writing...`) is teaching-tone — useful for first-read but heavy after first read. Tighten without removing. §4 Step 4 triplicate AGENTS.md is the clearest single win. Score 3.0/5.0 pre-cycle.
persona_consensus.newcomer_stress_tester: Walkthrough timing checkpoints ('~30 seconds elapsed', '~3.5 minutes', '~13 minutes Done') are GREAT — keep them. Three separate AGENTS.md code blocks feel like 'wait, am I doing this 3 times?'. Collapse. Score 3.5/5.0 pre-cycle.

step_2_persona_qa.qa_synthesis: 4/4 personas approve: preserve §6 (cross-doc constraint); collapse §4 Step 4 AGENTS.md triplicate; tighten §4 prose end-to-end; condense §7 + §8 to 1-2 sentence form. Implementation: full-file Write replacement.

step_3_generate_or_regen_images.decision: NO image generation — text-only D14 cycle; D13 deferred; cycle 124 has no D11-icon reuse.
step_3_generate_or_regen_images.d13_substrate_dependency_disposition: N/A at cycle 124 (D13 substrate dependency at cycles 125-126).

Full-file Write replacement with 7 structural cuts: §1 intro tightened; §3 essential files + triad merged; §4 Step 1 directory-tree dropped; §4 Step 4 three AGENTS.md → 1 template + 3-row substitution; §6 Starter Templates preserved per cross-doc constraint (agent_first_guide.md §3 textual '§ 6' reference) but tightened (MANIFEST+STATE merged annotated block); §7 Pitfalls condensed to single-paragraph bullets; §8 What to Do Next condensed to single-sentence bullets. Zero anchor-link breakage; 9 h2 sections preserved. 4th canonical D14 cycle JSON. Image-gen $0.00; cumulative v8 P5 ledger unchanged at $1.72 of $50.
